reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this game and the feeling of being inside of the homes and able to decorate them but after a lot of time spent on this game all of a sudden the houses stopped loading so I’m not sure what went wrong or if I’m able to fix the problem or might have to delete the app since it’s not loading for me to explore the houses.

I downloaded this thinking I could essentially create a house that mimics the size and shape of my real house and then use it to design new layouts for my real rooms, but you cannot do that. I’m honestly not sure what the purpose of this app is but it seems pointless.

developer_response.body: Hi gamesharq - we regret that homeparx is not the type of app you’ve expected. Maybe we should explain it better. Homeparx is intended to bring real planed homes to VR before they where built. If people planning to build a house and they got the plans from the architect, they could send it over to us and we create the 3d model and present it via homeparx.

reviews.review_description: I enjoy touring and walking thru different home layouts and this app provides that walkthrough experience. Walking outside of the homes after decorating and looking thru the windows is a cool option too. And the fly option allows you to look at the layers of the house pre decorative or after. I also enjoy painting the walls and decorating the homes. I just wished it had more furniture and decor options to choose from as well as the wallpaper option working.

reviews.review_title: would love to see more houses!
reviews.review_description: hey love the app, would be awesome if i could download more home etc to explore or view user submitted designs, more options as turning on the water taps,shower etc, tunr on room lights maybe.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback and sorry for the late answer. We’ve been very busy with developing our brand new version of homeparx. It is released now and as you wished with a bunch of fantastic new homes.

reviews.review_description: I think this app is presenting real properties for sale in Germany. The presentation is awesome and I enjoy it very well. You should show the dimensions and surface area of each room. Good luck

developer_response.body: Hi yes4me - we may consider your proposal in our next release - thx. Meanwhile we added a lot of other new cool features. E.g. the ability to place interior freely in all the homes.
